allow: Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('proxied state ok, cells:', len\(d['cells']\), 'pois:', len\(d['pois']\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('cells', len\(d['cells']\), 'pois', len\(d['pois']\), 'state', d['match_state']\)")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5273 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5273 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table -AutoSize)
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('tick', d['tick'], 'state', d['match_state']\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('tick', d['tick'], 'state', d['match_state'], 'stats', d['stats']\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('tick', d['tick'], 'elapsed_s', d['elapsed_s'], 'speed', d['speed'], 'tick_hz', d['params']['tick_hz'], 'expected_elapsed', d['tick'] * \(1/d['params']['tick_hz']\) * d['speed']\)")

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter 'Name="python.exe" OR Name="uvicorn.exe" OR Name="node.exe"' | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'uvicorn|fastapi|vite|hexa|server.main' } | Select-Object ProcessId,Name,CommandLine | Format-List)

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 48424,23392,41168,48444,32640 -Force -ErrorAction Continue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter 'Name="python.exe" OR Name="uvicorn.exe" OR Name="node.exe"' | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'uvicorn|vite|server.main' } | Select-Object ProcessId,Name,CommandLine | Format-List)
